testSuite.details: Middleware vitest 208/208 (+ 2 gated skipped); Foundry forge test 52/52; forked-e2e 5/5 (10.19 s); middleware coverage lines 96.69% / branches 88.88% / funcs 100%; forge branch coverage 100% on PaymentSplitterFactory and PaymentVaultImpl.

suites.result: 52 passed, 0 failed across 3 suites (29 factory + 20 vault + 3 invariants)
PaymentSplitterFactory: 100% branches (6/6); PaymentVaultImpl: 100% branches (4/4). Above >=95% gate.
NOT RUN (env vars ARC_RPC_URL, PAYWALL_RELAYER_KEY, ARC_TESTNET_PAYER_PK, ARC_TESTNET_DEVELOPER_EOA, PAYMENT_SPLITTER_FACTORY_ADDRESS not present; gated for post-deploy / nightly CI)
tsup ESM-only; dist/index.js 35.53 KB raw, 8.94 KB minified+gzip with viem external. Below 30 KB gate.
1 finding: documented public anvil pre-funded account-0 key in tasks/11.md:183 (audit-security I-SCRIPT-01, INFORMATIONAL). NOT A SECRET. Follow-up: .gitleaksignore entry.

deferredToPostDeploy.reason: Requires Task 16 to broadcast forge script --verify against Arc Testnet
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationCondition: Live factory address on Arc Testnet
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationSteps: Open https://testnet.arcscan.app/address/<factoryAddress> and confirm source is verified; if not, run README §Deploy fallback recipe (forge verify-contract --chain-id 5042002 ...)

deferredToPostDeploy.criterion: D-04 / T-06: Live Arc Testnet e2e (ARC_TESTNET_E2E=1)
deferredToPostDeploy.reason: Requires funded relayer key, payer, registered developer, deployed factory address — not present in dev environment
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationCondition: All five env vars set: ARC_RPC_URL, PAYWALL_RELAYER_KEY, ARC_TESTNET_PAYER_PK, ARC_TESTNET_DEVELOPER_EOA, PAYMENT_SPLITTER_FACTORY_ADDRESS
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationSteps: ARC_TESTNET_E2E=1 npm run test:e2e --workspace=@universal-paywall/middleware → assert exit 0; assert 402 ajv-schema-valid, 200 + X-PAYMENT-RESPONSE base64 decode, vault USDC balance delta equals value; capture live tx hash; resolve hash on https://testnet.arcscan.app

deferredToPostDeploy.criterion: T-07: Deploy script outputs factory address; verifiable on arcscan
deferredToPostDeploy.reason: Arcscan-side verification requires a live deploy
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationSteps: Read FACTORY_ADDRESS from forge broadcast log; cross-check against deployed factory storage via cast call; open address on https://testnet.arcscan.app and confirm verified

deferredToPostDeploy.criterion: T-11 (out of band) — README user walk-through
deferredToPostDeploy.reason: Task 11 Verify-user is a user-driven sign-off, not a deploy gate
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationCondition: User runs the README onboarding steps end-to-end
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationSteps: User: faucet → npx tsx scripts/register.ts → npm install + start middleware → hand-crafted EIP-3009 signer hits the endpoint; user confirms each step works as written
